description_long: This is a classic wooden chessboard with a standard 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, bordered by a light-colored wooden frame. The board features engraved alphanumeric coordinates along the edges, aiding in move notation. The chess pieces are crafted in two distinct colors: a natural light wood and a dark, almost black wood, each set including pawns, knights, bishops, rooks, queens, and kings. The pieces are traditionally shaped, with the knights displaying carved horse heads and the other pieces exhibiting recognizable silhouettes. The board and pieces have a matte finish, with visible wood grain and slight surface texture, suggesting hand-carved or artisanal craftsmanship. The overall set is compact and portable, suitable for use on a park table, sidewalk, or urban plaza.
description: A wooden chessboard with engraved coordinates and a full set of light and dark wooden chess pieces, featuring a classic checkered pattern and a sturdy border.
description_view_0: The chessboard is seen from the side with the dark pieces closest, showing the engraved numbers along the edge and a clear view of the chess pieces' arrangement.
description_view_1: This view presents the board from the light pieces' side, highlighting the lettered border and the detailed carving of the light chess pieces.
description_view_2: The board is rotated to show the dark pieces on the right, with both sets of pieces visible and the wood grain of the border clearly seen.
description_view_3: The chessboard is viewed from the dark pieces' side, emphasizing the dark chess pieces and the engraved letters on the border.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating light and dark squares forming a classic checkered design. The squares are perfectly square-shaped and evenly spaced, with no decorative elements within the grid itself. The border features engraved alphanumeric coordinates for reference.
attribute_border_design: The border is made of light-colored wood, approximately 2-3 centimeters wide, with engraved letters (A-H) and numbers (1-8) marking the columns and rows. The border is plain with no additional ornamentation, providing a clean and functional frame for the playing area.
